title: Day 8 Vocabulary — Future Perfect & Professional English

words.simpleMeaning: to successfully complete a task

sentences.daily: By next month, I will have accomplished all my fitness goals.
sentences.office: By Friday, we will have accomplished the sprint objectives.
sentences.interview: In two years, I will have accomplished significant milestones.
sentences.business: By Q4, the team will have accomplished the annual targets.
sentences.formal: The committee will have accomplished its mandate by year-end.
sentences.informal: By tomorrow, I'll have accomplished everything on my list.

words.simpleMeaning: to reach a goal through effort

sentences.daily: By 30, I will have attained financial independence.

sentences.business: By 2030, we will have attained global market presence.

sentences.informal: By then, I'll have attained my dream job.
